title: How the Mind-Blowing Six-Minute Single-Shot in 'True Detective' Set the Bar for TV Tracking Shots

og.title: How the Mind-Blowing Six-Minute Single-Shot in 'True Detective' Set the Bar for TV Tracking Shots
og.description: Nerdstalgic looked at the intricate choreography behind the mind-blowing six-minute single-shot from the first season of "True Detective".
